Nippon India Large Cap Fund
Large Cap Fund
Details as on May 31, 2026
Type of Scheme
An open ended equity scheme predominantly investing in large cap
stocks.
Current Investment Philosophy
This is a large-cap fund, predominantly investing in stocks of the top
100 companies by full market capitalization.
